The '''''Indenture''''' was a [[Color/Legends|yellow]] and white [[Firespray-31-class patrol and attack craft/Legends|''Firespray-31''-class patrol and attack ship]] that was piloted by [[Krassis Trelix]] as part of the [[Karazak Slavers' Cooperative/Legends|Karazak Slavers Cooperative]]. The ship was notorious for traveling under multiple phony aliases and transponder IDs, including the '''''Salvation'''''.

In [[8 ABY/Legends|8 ABY]], the ''Indenture'' was destroyed when it tried to capture a cargo of [[Twi'lek/Legends|Twi'lek]] dancing-girls from a [[Mistryl Shadow Guard]] freighter, ''[[The Fury]]'', which was being flown by [[Shada D'ukal]]. Allies of the Mistryls later ensured that the Twi'leks were released, but left evidence suggesting that they had been kidnapped by the Karazaks so that the slaves' owner, [[Durga Besadii Tai]], would wage a war against the Karazaks.
